last_concepts: market_reaction: Taiwan overtakes India as world's 5th-largest stock market — TSMC is ~60% of the entire Taiwan index, meaning one semiconductor company effectively holds up a nation's equity market and just became visible to global macro investors

educational: Win rate is the wrong metric — risk/reward ratio determines profitability. You can win 60% and lose money if losses outpace wins; win 40% with 2% risk and 6% target and you're still growing
hot_take: The trading mentor and course industry is the most consistently profitable 'trading strategy' in existence — not for students, for the mentors. Revenue is tuition, not alpha
